title: Fairphone 3/3+ Android 13 (6.A.035.2) Update
description:
Software 6.A.035.2 is available for your Fairphone 3 or Fairphone 3+.
This system update includes the following changes:

Resolved issues
  • Fixed an issue causing microphone issues in some VoIP Apps
Other improvements
  • Security patch level: 5th of May, 2025

More information


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.
